checks.description: Ensure that Q never assumes an X or Z value after reset release, preserving definedness under ambiguity.
notes: Guard against undefined output during stabilization.
checks.pass_condition: Q must be 0 or a valid 64-bit value (no X/Z) after the settle period following reset release.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is deasserted and the design is observed for a settle period.

checks.description: Observe that Q updates on each rising edge of clk after reset, without assuming a fixed latency.
checks.pass_condition: After each rising edge of clk, Q should reflect the Johnson counter progression or remain stable if no progression is expected; exact cycle timing is not required.
checks.trigger_condition: When a clock edge occurs following reset release.
